Daily note template
item.description: Tasks query: There was an error expanding one or more placeholders.The error message was: Unknown property: date:YYYY-MM-DDThe problem is in: done on {{date:YYYY-MM-DD}}not done path does not include compras GROUP BY tags

item.title: Course MOC Template
item.description:
Learning Details Platform: {{platform}} Status: view: status Started: {{date}} Organized by your Notebook Navigator order.📁 THIS COURSE19 resultsSort1Filter2PropertiesSearchNewShowing 19file nameorder Syllabus
Course Certificate

item.title: 000 University MOC
item.description:
📊 Academic Performance Summary Weighted GPA: N/A (based on 0 graded credits) Unweighted GPA: N/A (based on 0 courses) Completed Credits: 0 Active Courses: 0 Multi column The most urgent academic priorities for Semester {{semester}}. 🎓 THIS SEMESTER0 resultsSort1Filter2PropertiesSearchNewShowing 0file namesemesteracademic_yearexam_date_aMoed A Days Leftexam_date_b Enroll in New Course 📚 Library
🗺️ Knowledge Atlas A complete history of all your university courses and grades.Views0 resultsSortFilterPropertiesSearchNew0 tasks Enrollment: Use the button above. The script detects Semester A (Oct-Feb), Semester B (Mar-Jul), or Summer automatically. Sequencing: Use the order property in your lecture notes to maintain chronological order in the "THIS COURSE" view. Finals: Input your exam_date in the individual course MOC to have it appear in the "This Semester" leaderboard.

item.title: University Dashboard
item.description: 🎓 THIS SEMESTER0 resultsSort1Filter2PropertiesSearchNewShowing 0file namesemesteracademic_yearexam_date_aMoed A Days Leftexam_date_bMoed B Days Leftcredits

item.title: 090 Atlas
item.description:
Welcome to your central repository of evergreen notes and knowledge structures. This is where courses, projects, and clippings are synthesized into long-term understanding.Multi column Discrete Math
Complex Numbers
Set Theory
algebra
Pre CS Course
General Security Notes
Reverse Engineering
Malware Dev
Binary Exploitation
CTF Dojo
General Resources
C Programming
Modern C (Book)
📥 Raw Resource Inbox
📰 Clippings (Web Import)
📺 Youtube Learning

item.title: 000 Courses MOC
item.description:
Multi column 🔥 ACTIVE LEARNING0 resultsSort1Filter2PropertiesSearchNewShowing 0file namepriorityplatformsubject Start New Course 📥 Inbox
🗺️ Atlas 📚 ALL COURSES0 resultsSort1Filter1PropertiesSearchNewShowing 0file namestatusplatformdate_started Tracking: Use the priority (1-10) to decide what to learn next. Resources: Drop PDFs or links into the Resources subfolder to keep the dashboard clean. Navigator: Set order: 1, order: 2, etc., in your lecture notes to flip through them easily.

item.title: 000 Projects MOC
item.description:
This view is live-synced with your project folders. Changing a status here updates the file automatically.🏆 ALL PROJECTS0 resultsSort1Filter1PropertiesSearchNewShowing 0file nameprioritystatustagssubjectMulti column Runs the automation script to build folders and the MOC. Create New Project Inbox: 011 Resource Inbox
Knowledge: 090 Atlas Active Projects: (View the tab below) Prioritization: Set your priority between 1-10. The "ALL PROJECTS" tab sorts these descending by default. Navigation: Use Notebook Navigator once you jump into a specific project folder to maintain your research flow. Organization: Ensure all new projects have type: project_moc to appear in this dashboard.

item.title: 000 Home MOC
item.description:
🧠 Instant Idea 📓 Daily Note 📝 New Assignment 🚀 Projects
🏫 University
🎓 Courses
🗺️ Knowledge Combined view of your active technical projects and upcoming university exams.🔥 ACTIVE0 resultsSort1Filter2PropertiesSearchNewShowing 0file nameprioritysubject🎓 THIS SEMESTER0 resultsSortFilterPropertiesSearchNew0 tasksDataview: No results to show for table query.Multi column Dataview: No results to show for list query. Dataview: No results to show for list query.
